reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención! Vayan con paciencia ya que hay pocos empleados. Ayuden a la gente q labura ahi, bajen del auto, dejen listo para la carga el vehiculo y quizas todo sea más rapido.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Please be patient as there are few employees. Help the staff; get out of your car, leave your vehicle ready for loading, and things might go much faster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcUxTN0dnEAE

reviews.comment:
La falta de playeros genera colas interminables. Parece que una estación de servicio no es rentable si no tiene personal en la cantidad necesaria.

(Translated by Google)
The lack of attendants creates endless queues. It seems a gas station isn't profitable if it doesn't have enough staff.
